11-28-23; Effective: 01-01-24; Implementation:01-02-24) 
 For services furnished on or after January 1, 2017 and before January 1, 
2024, sections 1834 and 1861(m)(5) of the Act required a separate 
payment to an HHA for an applicable disposable device, to an individual 
who received home health services for which payment was made under 
the Medicare home health benefit. Section 1834 of the Act defines an 
applicable device as a disposable NPWT device that is an integrated 
system comprised of
